div.div:
Every operation in a channel is scoped to that channel's enclave.
The agent never asks "which enclave?" -- it resolves from context.

div.div:
channel_id --> enclave_name (from channel name or metadata)
user_id --> owner_email (from Keycloak JWT claims)
The agent never prompts for these. Both are resolved automatically.

div.div:
The Kraken acts AS the user, not as a service account.
All K8s annotations, git commits, and audit logs reflect the human's identity.

div.div:
Channel message --> single-enclave operation (automatic scoping)
Direct message --> cross-enclave operation (explicit choice)
This is the fundamental access model. All tooling enforces it.
